evals.prompt: build a user authentication feature with email/password login for the auth module
evals.expected_output: A PLAN.md in .context/ with success criteria, tasks with dependencies, and documented assumptions/decisions. Should reference the auth module from .ystack/config.json.
assertions: A PLAN.md file is created in a .context/ subdirectory
The plan includes goal-backward success criteria
The plan has numbered tasks with clear descriptions
The plan references the correct module from .ystack/config.json
The plan does NOT contain any implementation code

evals.prompt: /build add Stripe webhook handling to the payments module
evals.expected_output: A PLAN.md scoped to the payments module with tasks covering webhook endpoint, signature verification, and event routing. Should identify dependencies on existing payment code.
assertions: Tasks cover webhook endpoint setup and signature verification
The plan identifies dependencies on existing payments code
Success criteria are measurable and verifiable
The plan includes a DECISIONS.md or decisions section

evals.prompt: I want to build a search feature. Users should be able to search across all docs by keyword.
evals.expected_output: A PLAN.md that handles the vague request by asking clarifying questions or making documented assumptions about scope, then produces a structured plan.
assertions: Ambiguity in the request is addressed via assumptions or clarifying questions
The plan scopes the feature to specific modules
Tasks have clear ordering and dependencies
